prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed Japanese pachislot machine themed as an official character slot cabinet for Nozomu, photographed front-on in an arcade with blurred neighboring machines and colorful neon lights.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, close-up product-photo composition showing the full upper screen, three slot reels, control panel, and lower character art panel. Use glossy reflections, glass, chrome, acrylic, LEDs, and dense decorative detail.

Main cabinet design: A cute romantic pink pachislot cabinet covered in transparent jewel-like plastic, heart-shaped corner ornaments, faceted crystal trim, lace patterns, pastel flowers, bows, holographic stickers, and glowing pink-purple-white LEDs. The machine should feel like a limited-edition anime idol/love-themed slot machine, extremely ornate and sparkling.

Top display: Large illuminated Japanese headline at the top reads 「キャラ777診断」. The main LCD shows a soft anime girl with light brown hair, blue-pink sparkling eyes, blush, floral hair accessories, winking and holding a pink heart candy. The screen background is pastel pink with hearts, bokeh, sparkles, lace, and floating flowers. Overlay huge glossy gold-and-pink “777” numbers in the center, with the win message 「ときめきハート確定♥」 beneath it.

Left status menu on the LCD: Include exactly 4 stacked rounded labels with Japanese text: 1) 「状態」 / 「超きゅん」, 2) 「RUSH」 / 「恋するほっぺRUSH」, 3) 「BONUS」 / 「ふわ恋BONUS」, 4) 「フリーズ」 / 「ウィンクフリーズ」. Make them look like small pachislot UI badges in pink, purple, and orange.

Slot reels: Show exactly 3 vertical reels in the center window, each stopped on a large pink-gold number 7 so the result is exactly 777. Surrounding visible symbols include hearts, flower clusters, a pink bow, and pastel cloud-like flowers. The reels should be glossy and slightly curved like a real slot machine.

Controls and lower panel: Below the reels include a chrome control area with exactly 3 round glowing pink stop buttons, a black knob on the left, a coin slot or card slot on the right, and small red/blue digital counters. The lower artwork panel shows the same pastel anime girl in a frilly outfit with braided hair and flowers; place a plain skin-tone square censor block over the center of her face area, while the rest of the panel remains decorated with hearts, bows, lace, and pastel flowers. Include a large ornate heart label on the lower right reading 「のぞむ」.

Visual style: Ultra-polished photorealistic pachinko/pachislot cabinet mixed with kawaii anime illustration, high saturation, pink romantic palette, gold beveled typography, glitter, lens bloom, reflective plastic, arcade depth of field, premium toy-like realism.

Constraints: Keep all visible Japanese text legible and in the positions described. Use exactly 3 reels and exactly 3 glowing stop buttons. Do not add extra characters, logos, watermarks, or English text. The overall mood is cute, lucky, romantic, and celebratory, like a “777 diagnosis” result screen personalized for Nozomu.
